summary: c=2 auto MoE path selection: retained-bench auto mode now resolves c=2 to generated-token-green selected_c1_batch MoE while preserving grouped_compact for c=4/c=8. Active c2 runtime improves materially, but selected_c1_batch remains below c1 and is not promoted as a retained c2 throughput claim.

Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /opt/rocm/lib/llvm/bin

code_change.description: --batch-decode-moe-path default is now auto; auto resolves to selected_c1 for batch_size==2 and grouped_compact otherwise. Runtime environment and workload payload use the resolved path. Unit coverage verifies c2 auto selected_c1 and c4 auto grouped_compact.

retained_claim_blockers: projection_best_vs_c1 remains below 1.0, so c2 retained promotion still fails aggregate-vs-c1 scaling
selected_c1_batch MoE is now the auto c2 runtime choice for evidence collection but the retained benchmark rollup is not updated because performance_claim=false

source_tmp_artifacts.dirty_primary_before_commit: /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json from pre-commit dirty run overwritten by clean rerun; see WORKLOG for dirty 125.987 tok/s

conclusion.reason: Auto c2 selected-c1 MoE materially improves the default c2 runtime path and keeps generated-token equality green, but the best projection-check run is still only 0.941x c1, so no retained c2 throughput claim is made.

commands.primary_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit d8df4b11 with HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1; output /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json
commands.projection_checks: Two HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 retained-bench projection-check runs with auto MoE, primitive correctness, and projection-dispatch evidence; outputs /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-auto-selected-moe-projcheck-clean-iter114-{1,2}.json
commands.profile: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-auto-selected-moe-profile-clean-iter114 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-auto-selected-moe-profiled-clean-iter114.json
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
